cache_context.notes: SIPRI Arms Transfers 2026 released March 9. All other annual/quarterly/monthly sources not due.

agents.name: official_stats_gatherer
agents.notes: Pre-fetched WB (1960) + IMF WEO (1003). 75 countries, ~28 indicators/country.

agents.name: financial_data_gatherer
agents.notes: 74 FX rates (fresh), 10 bonds, 11 equities, 11 commodities, 2 CB decisions. Bond/equity/commodity data carried from W10.

agents.name: news_events_gatherer
agents.notes: 89 events, 11 event_triggers. Dominant: US-Iran war, Hormuz closure, G7 SPR release.

agents.name: trade_sanctions_gatherer
agents.notes: Part A skipped (cached). 23 event records: 12 sanctions, 5 chokepoint, 3 tariff, 1 WTO, 1 trade agreement.

agents.name: military_conflict_gatherer
agents.notes: SIPRI Arms Transfers 2026 extracted (12 structured). 20 events: 7 conflict, 2 arms deals, 5 exercises, 3 nuclear, 3 cyber.

agents.name: political_regulatory_gatherer
agents.notes: 444 WGI structured from pre-fetched data (74 countries × 6 indicators). 13 weekly political events.

agents.name: fact_extractor
agents.notes: 2656 factor updates + 145 event signals + 11 event triggers mapped to schema.

agents.name: cross_validator
agents.notes: 2656 validated: 2328 ACCEPT, 244 ACCEPT_WITH_NOTE, 77 FLAG, 1 REJECT (IRQ inflation -12.3% vs IMF 1.5%), 6 ESCALATE (GDP swings >3pp: RUS, ARG, IRL, IRN, KWT, LBY). 145 event signals + 11 event triggers passed through.

agents.name: archive_commit_preparer
agents.notes: Archive snapshot created. 75 country summaries, 75 country detail chunks, 556 total chunk files.
